channel.title: Floor-Sum on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Floor-Sum on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #1.1: Divisibility Blocking (Floor-Division Decomposition)
item.description: Divisibility blocking for O(sqrt n) floor-sum evaluation: lemma, single-variable loop, O(1) interval sum requirements, two-variable min-trick, multi-variable pseudocode, and ceiling-division blocking.

item.title: Combinatorics #0: Common Formulae & Conclusions
item.description: A compact toolkit of geometric sums, floor-sum transformations, XOR facts, Fibonacci identities, and perfect-square patterns.
